elements.text:
Your friend is having a huge birthday party and most of the people in your group of friends will be there. You know you can't afford a gift for your friend.

Here are some behaviors that someone might do at that moment or in the future:

texts: I smile at all of my friends.
I want to skip the party so I don't have to think about not being able to afford the present, but decide to push myself to go anyway. I can make my friend happy by showing up for her.
I have fun dancing at the party.
I'm tempted to leave before the presents are opened, but remind myself that I'm actually having fun.
I try to sneak by my friend so they don't notice I don't have a gift when I walk in.
